FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: AI Detects Bullish Bias as BOJ Tightens and Price Holds Above MA20
tldr_points: Price above MA20 indicates short‑term bullish momentum
BOJ likely to hike, supporting yen weakness
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY eyes higher levels as BOJ prepares rate hike and price steadies above MA20.
FX.comment: Long bias supported by BOJ tightening, price above MA20, and net long order flow.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: Price trades above MA20 indicating bullish momentum
AI-driven earnings optimism supports further upside
Technical structure shows room to test 7700 resistance
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 holds above MA20 on AI optimism, targeting 7700 with disciplined risk.
STOCKS.comment: Price above MA20 with AI-driven upside potential

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] DOWN: Price Below MA20 Amid Mixed Fundamentals
tldr_points: BTC trades below the 20‑day MA, signaling near‑term bearish pressure.
Fundamentals show mixed signals with pro‑crypto political wins offset by regulatory headwinds and DeFi outflows.
Key resistance lies near 78.5k; support zone around 73k‑74k.
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC under MA20 pressure; mixed news favors short‑term downside despite some pro‑crypto catalysts.
CRYPTO.comment: BTC under MA20 pressure; mixed news favors short‑term downside despite some pro‑crypto catalysts.
